name: lista-de-atividades-mobile
description: Aplicativo mobile da lista de atividades com lembretes visuais.

scripts.prepare:web: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-Item -Path 'www' -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null; New-Item -Path 'www/vendor' -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'index.html' -Destination 'www/index.html' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'style.css' -Destination 'www/style.css' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'scripts.js' -Destination 'www/scripts.js' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'native-sound-picker.js' -Destination 'www/native-sound-picker.js' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'backend-config.js' -Destination 'www/backend-config.js' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'remote-api.js' -Destination 'www/remote-api.js' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'admin.html' -Destination 'www/admin.html' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'admin.css' -Destination 'www/admin.css' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'admin.js' -Destination 'www/admin.js' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'node_modules/jspdf/dist/jspdf.umd.min.js' -Destination 'www/vendor/jspdf.umd.min.js' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'manifest.webmanifest' -Destination 'www/manifest.webmanifest' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'update.json' -Destination 'www/update.json' -Force; if (Test-Path 'icons') { New-Item -Path 'www/icons' -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'icons/*' -Destination 'www/icons' -Recurse -Force }"
scripts.mobile:refresh: npm run assets:generate && npm run cap:sync:android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:add:android: npm run build && npx cap add android
scripts.cap:sync:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:normalize-assets: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$publicPath='android/app/src/main/assets/public'; if (Test-Path $publicPath) { Set-Content -Path ($publicPath + '/cordova.js') -Value '// Cordova bridge placeholder for Capacitor build.' -Encoding UTF8; Set-Content -Path ($publicPath + '/cordova_plugins.js') -Value 'window.cordova = window.cordova || {}; window.cordova.plugins = window.cordova.plugins || {};' -Encoding UTF8; New-Item -Path ($publicPath + '/vendor') -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'node_modules/jspdf/dist/jspdf.umd.min.js' -Destination ($publicPath + '/vendor/jspdf.umd.min.js') -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'index.html' -Destination ($publicPath + '/index.html') -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'scripts.js' -Destination ($publicPath + '/scripts.js') -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'style.css' -Destination ($publicPath + '/style.css') -Force }"
scripts.android: npm run cap:sync:android && npx cap open android
scripts.release:apk: npm run cap:sync:android && npm run android:normalize-assets && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location android; .\gradlew.bat assembleRelease"
scripts.release:aab: npm run cap:sync:android && npm run android:normalize-assets && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location android; .\gradlew.bat bundleRelease"
